title: extraction_notes page 1
content: Extraction Engine Notes The system collects structured and unstructured text from mixed enterprise sources. Normalization converts each item into a training-ready record with provenance metadata. Important checks include source-type detection, missing field handling, and issue logging. Failed rows should not stop the batch run; they should be surfaced in diagnostics instead.

Failed rows should not stop the batch run; they should be surfaced in diagnostics instead.

title: Open Source AI Readiness Bulletin
content: Open Source AI Readiness Bulletin Weekly operating notes, milestones, and action items for the internship project. AI Ops Readiness Bulletin Current focus areas The analytics team is preparing a reusable extraction pipeline for internal knowledge assets. Source reliability is graded weekly, and failed rows are tracked for later review. Website parsing with resilient HTML cleanup PDF chunking for downstream fine-tuning datasets Spreadsheet normalization across business teams
